sentences.arabic: تَتَجَنَّبُ غَادَةُ الطَّعَامَ الْمَقْلِيَّ وَتُفَضِّلُ الْمَشْوِيَّ.
sentences.translation: Gada izbjegava prženu hranu i preferira roštilj.
sentences.translationEn: Ghada avoids fried food and prefers grilled food.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ لَهَا الطَّبِيبُ إِنَّ الشَّوِيَّ أَقَلُّ دَسَمًا.
sentences.translation: Ljekar joj je rekao da je roštilj manje mastan.
sentences.translationEn: The doctor told her that grilled food has less fat.

sentences.arabic: تَطْبُخُ الدَّجَاجَ وَالسَّمَكَ فِي الْفُرْنِ بَدَلَ الْقَلْيِ.
sentences.translation: Kuha piletinu i ribu u pećnici umjesto prženja.
sentences.translationEn: She cooks chicken and fish in the oven instead of frying.

sentences.arabic: طَعَامُهَا لَذِيذٌ وَصِحِّيٌّ فِي نَفْسِ الْوَقْتِ.
sentences.translation: Njena hrana je ukusna i zdrava u isto vrijeme.
sentences.translationEn: Her food is tasty and healthy at the same time.
